# vision2code - Full Site Content

> Freelance software developer. Webapps, APIs, AI integrations, automation. Remote, worldwide.

---

## Hero

**VISION -> CODE.**
I build web applications that don't feel like software - they feel like good tools. Clean code, clear UX, honest consulting.

**PROCESSES WITHOUT PAPER.**
Manual spreadsheets, double entries, Excel ping-pong. I build the connections that finally automate your office.

**AI THAT WORKS.**
No demos, no hype. I integrate LLMs, RAG pipelines and vision models where they actually save you time.

---

## Services

vision2code is deliberately generalist. The whole product is built end-to-end - from concept to running server. No ping-pong between agencies, no "that's not our department."

**Web Applications**
Dashboards, internal tools, platforms. Software your team actually enjoys using - and that's still maintainable two years from now.

**Websites**
Marketing sites, landing pages, portfolios. Fast, clean, search-engine friendly. CMS integration if you want to manage content yourself.

**API & Integration**
Making systems talk to each other. CRM <-> accounting, shop <-> ERP, calendar <-> telephony. Data flows instead of data standstill.

**AI Solutions**
LLMs, RAG pipelines, vision models. Concretely integrated into your workflow - not as a demo, but as a feature.

**Automation**
From "someone does it manually" to "the system handles it". Scrapers, cronjobs, n8n flows, scripts. All documented.

**Consulting & Maintenance**
Code review, architecture audits, bug triage, technical roadmaps. Sparring partner for technical decisions.

---

## Process

**Step 1 - Listen**
Initial call, free, no sales pitch. The problem is understood first, then solutions are proposed.

**Step 2 - Design**
User flows, wireframes, technical architecture, stack choice. Fixed price or transparent hourly budget.

**Step 3 - Build**
Weekly demos instead of months-long black box. Progress visible in real time, course-corrections early.

**Step 4 - Handover**
Clean documentation, deployment, training. Optional ongoing maintenance. Complete code export - client owns everything.

---

## Case Studies

**AI / Healthcare - Radiology reporting assistant (Hamburg)**
RAG system based on medical history, previous findings and image descriptions. Suggestions finalized by the doctor - AI accelerates, doesn't replace.
Result: -62% reporting time per patient.

**Automation / SME - Invoice routing (Cologne wholesale distributor)**
Incoming invoices from email, OCR, rule-based cost-center assignment, direct DATEV integration. One click to approve instead of three accountants in a loop.
Result: 14 hours per week saved, permanently.

**Webapp / SaaS - Booking dashboard for coaching network**
From Figma to production webapp in 11 weeks. Stripe subscriptions, calendar sync, in-app messaging. Team now runs the system independently.
Result: 0 -> 1,200 active coaches in 6 months.

---

## About

vision2code is one person: a developer for webapps, APIs, AI integrations and automation. Clients hire the developer directly and get the developer. No middleman, no team you never meet.

Enough projects have been seen to know where most problems start: not in the code, but before it. Unclear requirements, wrong stack choices, features nobody needs. Time is invested in understanding the problem before building starts.

Clients get someone who thinks along - not just executes.

---

## Contact

Email: hallo@vision2co.de
Response time: within 24 hours
Location: Remote, working worldwide
Availability: 2 project slots from July 2026

Services offered: Webapp / internal software, Website / landing page, API & integration, AI integration, Automation, Consulting / code audit.
